input: Here is one cathygo.ocr_layout JSON for a single photographed question. Build a problem set.
expected_behavior: Return cathygo.problem_set with one problem and mode single or auto inferred as single.
must_not: Call GLM-OCR, solve the question, or render HTML.

input: Here are two ordered cathygo.ocr_layout JSON files for one question that continues on the next photographed page.
expected_behavior: Use stitch or paper continuation rules to keep one logical question across both pages and report the expanded pageSpan.
must_not: Split the continuation into separate numbered problems or invent missing page text.

input: Here are OCR layout JSON files for a worksheet with section headers and numbered questions.
expected_behavior: Return multiple problems with section labels, numbers, and per-problem screenshotCandidates.
must_not: Answer any question or merge unrelated numbered problems.

input: I photographed some pages but I am not sure whether it is one question or a full worksheet. Segment with auto mode.
expected_behavior: Run paper segmentation first and infer whether the effective scenario is single, stitch, or paper.
must_not: Require the user to choose the mode before any segmentation attempt.

input: Please OCR this photographed exam image directly and then split it.
expected_behavior: Explain that OCR must happen in cathygo-ocr-layout first, then pass the resulting layout JSON here.
must_not: Call GLM-OCR from this Skill or store real exam assets in the repository.
